# task\-audit\-lifecycle\-mcp\-surface — Expose lifecycle mutations through MCP
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-mcp
readiness: not_eligible  reason: status_done

Add typed MCP tools for the finalized task and issue lifecycle operations and shared\-root behavior as thin wrappers over core functions\.

## Acceptance
- MCP exposes task create, update, set\-status, and reopen tools plus issue list, show, create, update, and close tools\.
- Tool schemas reuse or faithfully map the core Zod mutation inputs and return CommandResult\-compatible structured content\.
- Server startup resolves and discloses the selected ledger root without contaminating stdio protocol output\.
- MCP tests invoke every new tool across success and representative coded failure paths\.
- The MCP layer never writes canonical JSON directly\.
